productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Casual Olive Sandals
description: This stylish pair of floaters from lee cooper makes a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It’s a great combination of enhanced cushioning and durability. These sandals give superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish enough for everyday wear. You can team these with cargos or jeans and tees for a cool, casual look. Upper Synthetic leather uppers for better comfort and durability Stitch detailing for added style and reinforcement Velcro straps on the forefoot, mid-foot and behind the ankle to give a snig Fit Cushioned lining for extra comfort Brand name embossed behind the ankle strap Midsole Cushioned footbed with elevated bumps for all day comfort Outsole TPR outsole for durability and higher abrasion resistance Terraced wave grooves for better grip Slight heel for ergonomic comfort Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
